task: Parse and validate an X12 EDI 837P/I claim envelope (5010A1/A2). Emit normalized JSON: { format, claim_id, billing_provider, subscriber, claim, validation }. Pure rule-class - no inference. PHI fields (subscriber.member_id, patient identifiers) are redacted to opaque hashes.

recipes.name: edi-837
recipes.source: function generate(input,lib){var t=(input&&input.edi_text)||'',q=(lib&&lib.pack&&lib.pack.rules&&lib.pack.rules.qualifiers)||{},s=t.split('~').map(function(x){return x.trim()}).filter(Boolean),o={format:'837P',claim_id:'',billing_provider:{npi:'',tax_id:'<redacted>'},subscriber:{redacted_member_id:'<hash>',group_id:''},claim:{total_charge:0,service_facility:'',diagnosis_codes:[],services:[]},validation:{loops_valid:!1,qualifiers_valid:!1,balance_check:!1}},isa=0,gs=0,st=0,tot=0,bh=0,sh=0,cm=0;for(var i=0;i<s.length;i++){var f=s[i].split('*'),g=f[0];if(g==='ISA')isa=1;else if(g==='GS'){gs=1;if((f[8]||'').indexOf('005010X223')===0)o.format='837I'}else if(g==='ST'){st=1;if((f[3]||'').indexOf('005010X223')===0)o.format='837I'}else if(g==='HL'){if(f[3]==='20')bh=1;if(f[3]==='22')sh=1}else if(g==='NM1'&&f[1]==='85')o.billing_provider.npi=f[9]||'';else if(g==='CLM'){cm=1;o.claim_id=f[1]||'';o.claim.total_charge=+f[2]||0;o.claim.service_facility=(f[5]||'').split(':')[0]||''}else if(g==='SV1'){var pc=(f[1]||'').split(':'),ch=+f[2]||0;tot+=ch;o.claim.services.push({procedure_code:pc[1]||pc[0]||'',charge:ch,units:+f[4]||1,modifiers:[],dates_of_service:[]})}else if(g==='HI')for(var j=1;j<f.length;j++){var h=(f[j]||'').split(':');h[1]&&o.claim.diagnosis_codes.push(h[1])}}o.validation.loops_valid=!!(isa&&gs&&st&&bh&&sh&&cm);o.validation.qualifiers_valid=!!q;o.validation.balance_check=Math.abs(tot-o.claim.total_charge)<.01;return o}

pack.description: EDI 5010 qualifier dictionary for 837P/I transformation. Tenants extend qualifiers via params for plan-specific custom codes.
